title: Differences Between 10 and 101
wikitext:
[]: Differences Between 1.0 and 1.01             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Apr 26, 2008 9:47 pm So Anno says there's 266 tiny differences between the two. After having watched the film in perfect quality (so long cam rip, the film is now beautiful) I didn't really see any huge changes. All the mentions of Anno Lucasing up Eva 1.0 (though to be fair it so far is a Lucased up Neon Genesis Evangelion) seem false. Let's see if we can start pinpointing some of these changes. The only one I got was that the Elevator leading down to Central Dogma- on the floor counter no longer in the lower left hand corner does the sign say CAUTION- EMARGENCY PUSH- it's been corrected to read CAUTION- EMERGENCY PUSH. (1:14:07) I expect a lot of the changes are gonna little grammatical fixes in the English and German wording found throughout the film. So that's 1. 265 left to go?

[]:             Quote Post by kasuturo » Sat Apr 26, 2008 11:09 pm OK. Ehm... In 1.0, when Shamshel first appears flying over the sea, his "ribs" were moving. In 1.01, they stay still. 264 left?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Apr 26, 2008 11:49 pm kasuturo wrote: In 1.0, when Shamshel first appears flying over the sea, his "ribs" were moving. In 1.01, they stay still.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sun Apr 27, 2008 12:14 am I thought it was more menacing with the clacking ribs when you first see it. At least it's still there during the fight.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sun Apr 27, 2008 12:21 am NAveryW wrote: kasuturo wrote: In 1.0, when Shamshel first appears flying over the sea, his "ribs" were moving. In 1.01, they stay still.

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sun Apr 27, 2008 2:15 am Well, at least it seems to be just small spelling corections if the 'emargency' change is anything to go by - Evangelion has rather butchered the English language in the past.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka's Plug Suit » Sun Apr 27, 2008 2:23 am Well...it's been about five months since I last saw 1.0, and I just watched an MKV of 1.01, but I certainly don't remember all the captions introducing every character, mecha, Eva, and Angel in the series. Unless that's an added feature on the DVD that whoever made the MKV decided to leave on... The MKV also cut off before the credits were finished, but somehow, I don't think the DVD is like that...

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sun Apr 27, 2008 3:58 am My MKV was nothing like that...pretty strange.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Apr 27, 2008 4:13 am Asuka's Plug Suit wrote: Well...it's been about five months since I last saw 1.0, and I just watched an MKV of 1.01, but I certainly don't remember all the captions introducing every character, mecha, Eva, and Angel in the series. Unless that's an added feature on the DVD that whoever made the MKV decided to leave on...

[]:             Quote Post by kasuturo » Sun Apr 27, 2008 11:22 am Asuka's Plug Suit wrote: Well...it's been about five months since I last saw 1.0, and I just watched an MKV of 1.01, but I certainly don't remember all the captions introducing every character, mecha, Eva, and Angel in the series. Unless that's an added feature on the DVD that whoever made the MKV decided to leave on... The MKV also cut off before the credits were finished, but somehow, I don't think the DVD is like that...

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Apr 27, 2008 11:30 am There's a torrent of "Explanation" and then the regular movie. The 2 DVD rips that I've seen (IZ and Zero Raws) are both of the first DVD.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sun Apr 27, 2008 3:21 pm I know of one difference that I noticed . . . drum roll . . . 1/100 that is all.

[]:             Quote Post by exelm » Sun Apr 27, 2008 3:28 pm Well, i think there are also more protuberances in Lilith's body now? i'm not so sure.

[]:             Quote Post by kasuturo » Sun Apr 27, 2008 6:59 pm Maybe Misato's, Rei's, Maya's and Ritsuko's boobs and butts are bigger in 1.01 than in 1.0...

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Apr 29, 2008 5:53 pm I think I unintentionally found something! I had mentioned a while back that I thought it was possible to see Misato's nipples at one point, and one other person disagreed. It was really hard to tell from the original, so once I got TRUE DVD QUALITY I took a screenshot... Now, look what happens when you compare the two: The scene has been slightly redone! ...I think. Looking again, now I'm not so sure. The bathwater color seems to have been changed to something less pink, if nothing else. Or does kinescoping really make that much color difference? Still, I WAS RIGHT BECAUSE YOU CAN SEE HER NIPPLES, if only barely. The shape is definitely there, even if the areolae aren't colored differently.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Tue Apr 29, 2008 6:40 pm The only one I got was that the Elevator leading down to Central Dogma- on the floor counter no longer in the lower left hand corner does the sign say CAUTION- EMARGENCY PUSH- it's been corrected to read CAUTION- EMERGENCY PUSH. (1:14:07)

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Apr 29, 2008 7:27 pm The camera ruins the quality of the images by washing out the colors, so a proper color comparison would be hard to make. V wrote: ****NAvery; please carefully rewatch the scenes were characters are in Misato's bathtub and check the color of the water: did they change it to..."sepia" colored for both Misato and Shinji's scenes? You see we had this whole thing that "wait...are they trying to imply that ALL water is red/pink like LCL now?"...but freshwater lakes clearly aren't.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Tue Apr 29, 2008 8:45 pm well we're pointing out the images. Anyway, I don't mean I think there was a "mistake", I'm wondering if the creators themselves thought too many people were assuming "the bathtub water is red" so they changed it....or is it just that the camrip was bad?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Apr 29, 2008 8:58 pm It's the camrip. And look at the swimming pool in Shinji's school- it's blue, and not red.

[]:             Quote Post by Apathetic Piggy » Tue Apr 29, 2008 9:33 pm NAveryW wrote: Still, I WAS RIGHT BECAUSE YOU CAN SEE HER NIPPLES, if only barely. The shape is definitely there, even if the areolae aren't colored differently.

After having watched the film in perfect quality (so long cam rip, the film is now beautiful) I didn't really see any huge changes. All the mentions of Anno Lucasing up Eva 1.0 (though to be fair it so far is a Lucased up Neon Genesis Evangelion) seem false.
